{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Workforce Manager",
  "description": "Salesplat helps companies optimize for exponential growth in revenue and customer base by supplying the best talents, technologies, and solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Workforce Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	A high-growth technology firm is seeking a hybrid professional to manage a sub-regional workforce of data collectors and field agents.
	This role is a blend of HR strategy and operational community management.
	You will be tasked with building the scalable architecture required to manage a large-scale field team while ensuring high engagement and quality assurance.
	If you know how to build career paths for distributed teams and turn training into performance, this role is for you.


Key Responsibilities


	Create a scalable organizational architecture, including the design of organograms for state and zone managers.
	Develop clear career paths and professional development structures for the field workforce.
	Design and execute L&amp;D programs and motivation initiatives, such as leaderboards, for field agents.
	Build and manage monitoring systems to track performance and ensure high-level quality assurance.
	Efficiently manage underperformers and streamline workforce operational workflows.


Requirements


	5&ndash;7 years of experience in HR, Community Management, or Workforce Operations.
	Significant experience in Project Management is highly advantageous.
	Experience in developing L&amp;D programs for distributed or field-based teams.
	Strong analytical skills for monitoring performance metrics and quality assurance.


Salary
N450,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;favour.salesplat@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Workforce Manager Job at Salesplat Technologies




        
    

        
        Salesplat helps companies optimize for exponential growth in revenue and customer base by supplying the best talents, technologies, and solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Workforce Manager
Job Location: Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A high-growth technology firm is seeking a hybrid professional to manage a sub-regional workforce of data collectors and field agents.
	This role is a blend of HR strategy and operational community management.
	You will be tasked with building the scalable architecture required to manage a large-scale field team while ensuring high engagement and quality assurance.
	If you know how to build career paths for distributed teams and turn training into performance, this role is for you.


Key Responsibilities


	Create a scalable organizational architecture, including the design of organograms for state and zone managers.
	Develop clear career paths and professional development structures for the field workforce.
	Design and execute L&D programs and motivation initiatives, such as leaderboards, for field agents.
	Build and manage monitoring systems to track performance and ensure high-level quality assurance.
	Efficiently manage underperformers and streamline workforce operational workflows.


Requirements


	5–7 years of experience in HR, Community Management, or Workforce Operations.
	Significant experience in Project Management is highly advantageous.
	Experience in developing L&D programs for distributed or field-based teams.
	Strong analytical skills for monitoring performance metrics and quality assurance.


Salary
N450,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Officer",
  "description": "LVTOPSUN (Guangdong LVTOPSUN New Energy Co., Ltd.) isa professional Chinese manufacturer specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of&nbsp;lithium-ion energy storage batteries&nbsp;and systems, particularly for home and commercial use, offering solutions like LiFePO4 batteries, battery packs, and energy storage containers. Established in 2008, they focus on high-quality, safe, long-lasting products for solar energy integration, with business in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties / Responsibilities


	Assist in drafting specific job descriptions for various job positions in the company.
	Post job advertisements on various platforms and manage the influx of applications.
	Screen CVs, conduct initial interviews, check references, and prepare job offers for successful candidates.
	Coordinate the on boarding process, including preparing new hire paperwork (contracts, handbooks), conducting orientation sessions, and ensuring new sales staff understand company policies and culture.
	Assist in managing employee relations issues, resolving basic conflicts, and handling grievances or disciplinary procedures in line with company policy and legal requirements.
	Promote employee well-being initiatives and help foster a positive work environment, which is crucial for motivating a sales team.
	Manage leave requests, monitor attendance, and address related queries.
	Administer payroll and ensure employees receive accurate and timely compensation, including processing salary, bonuses, and sales commissions in coordination with the finance department.
	Manage employee benefits programs (health insurance, pensions, etc.), including enrollment and answering questions.
	Coordinate training and development programs, which might include specific sales techniques, product knowledge (solar/inverter tech), and soft skills workshops.
	Support managers in identifying training needs and implementing performance improvement plans.
	Maintain and update all employee records (both physical and electronic) with meticulous attention to detail.
	Ensure all HR practices comply with local labor laws and regulations to mitigate legal risks.
	Prepare HR documents such as employment contracts, offer letters, and policy updates.


Qualifications


	HND / BSc in Human Resources, Humanities, Social Sciences or related disciplines from a recognized university.


Experience:


	A minimum of four (4) years of relevant working experience in an organisation.
	Hands on experience of developing and implementing HR policies and procedures.
	Experience in developing and managing performance management processes, practices and systems.
	Experience with staff relations and dealing with staff issues including grievances.
	Proven experience in following up on staff training and development plans.
	Interested candidates (prefarably male, residing around Ago Palaceway, Amuwo Odofin, Festac and Isolo axis).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;voxaby2@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

HR Officer Job at Lvtopsun New Energy Company Limited




        
    

        
        LVTOPSUN (Guangdong LVTOPSUN New Energy Co., Ltd.) isa professional Chinese manufacturer specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of lithium-ion energy storage batteries and systems, particularly for home and commercial use, offering solutions like LiFePO4 batteries, battery packs, and energy storage containers. Established in 2008, they focus on high-quality, safe, long-lasting products for solar energy integration, with business in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer

Job Location: Lagos  
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties / Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist in drafting specific job descriptions for various job positions in the company.
	Post job advertisements on various platforms and manage the influx of applications.
	Screen CVs, conduct initial interviews, check references, and prepare job offers for successful candidates.
	Coordinate the on boarding process, including preparing new hire paperwork (contracts, handbooks), conducting orientation sessions, and ensuring new sales staff understand company policies and culture.
	Assist in managing employee relations issues, resolving basic conflicts, and handling grievances or disciplinary procedures in line with company policy and legal requirements.
	Promote employee well-being initiatives and help foster a positive work environment, which is crucial for motivating a sales team.
	Manage leave requests, monitor attendance, and address related queries.
	Administer payroll and ensure employees receive accurate and timely compensation, including processing salary, bonuses, and sales commissions in coordination with the finance department.
	Manage employee benefits programs (health insurance, pensions, etc.), including enrollment and answering questions.
	Coordinate training and development programs, which might include specific sales techniques, product knowledge (solar/inverter tech), and soft skills workshops.
	Support managers in identifying training needs and implementing performance improvement plans.
	Maintain and update all employee records (both physical and electronic) with meticulous attention to detail.
	Ensure all HR practices comply with local labor laws and regulations to mitigate legal risks.
	Prepare HR documents such as employment contracts, offer letters, and policy updates.


Qualifications


	HND / BSc in Human Resources, Humanities, Social Sciences or related disciplines from a recognized university.


Experience:


	A minimum of four (4) years of relevant working experience in an organisation.
	Hands on experience of developing and implementing HR policies and procedures.
	Experience in developing and managing performance management processes, practices and systems.
	Experience with staff relations and dealing with staff issues including grievances.
	Proven experience in following up on staff training and development plans.
	Interested candidates (prefarably male, residing around Ago Palaceway, Amuwo Odofin, Festac and Isolo axis).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Field Engineer",
  "description": "Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Qualification and Skills


	High school diploma or equivalent; technical certifications or Degree in a related field is a plus.
	Proven experience in network installations, preferably within an ISP or telecommunications environment.
	Strong knowledge of networking concepts, protocols, and equipment, such as routers, switches, modems, and cabling.
	Proficiency in troubleshooting network connectivity issues and resolving technical problems.
	Familiarity with various operating systems (Windows, Linux, macOS) and network diagnostic tools.
	Excellent communication and customer service skills to interact effectively with customers and internal teams.
	Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines in a field environment.
	Valid driver&#39;s license and willingness to travel to customer sites as required.
	Physical ability to lift and move networking equipment during installations.


Key Responsibilities
Installation and Configuration:


	Attending to customer premises to install and configure ISP services, including internet connectivity, routers, modems, and other networking equipment.
	Follow installation guidelines, technical specifications, and company procedures to ensure accurate setup and connectivity.
	Test and verify the performance of installed services to ensure they meet the desired speed, reliability, and quality standards.
	Educate customers on the proper use and maintenance of the installed equipment and services.


Troubleshooting and Issue Resolution:


	Diagnose and resolve technical issues related to network connectivity, equipment malfunction, or service disruptions.
	Respond to customer complaints or service requests in a timely manner and provide effective solutions to address their concerns.
	Collaborate with internal teams, such as coordinators, network operations and support, to escalate and resolve complex issues when necessary.
	Maintain detailed documentation of customer interactions, service requests, and problem resolutions.


Customer Service and Communication:


	Interact professionally and courteously with customers, ensuring a positive customer experience during the installation process.
	Communicate technical information to customers in a clear and understandable manner, addressing any questions or concerns they may have.
	Provide recommendations for improving network performance, equipment upgrades, or additional services based on customer requirements and industry best practices.
	Collaborate with sales teams or account managers to gather customer feedback and identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling services.


Quality Assurance and Compliance:


	Ensure installations are completed according to company standards, policies, and regulatory requirements.
	Perform regular audits and quality checks on installed services to identify any deficiencies and implement corrective actions.
	Stay updated with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices related to ISP installations to enhance service delivery and customer satisfaction.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp; recruitment@cobranet.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Field Engineer Job at Cobranet Limited




        
    

        
        Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Engineer

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Qualification and Skills


	High school diploma or equivalent; technical certifications or Degree in a related field is a plus.
	Proven experience in network installations, preferably within an ISP or telecommunications environment.
	Strong knowledge of networking concepts, protocols, and equipment, such as routers, switches, modems, and cabling.
	Proficiency in troubleshooting network connectivity issues and resolving technical problems.
	Familiarity with various operating systems (Windows, Linux, macOS) and network diagnostic tools.
	Excellent communication and customer service skills to interact effectively with customers and internal teams.
	Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines in a field environment.
	Valid driver's license and willingness to travel to customer sites as required.
	Physical ability to lift and move networking equipment during installations.


Key Responsibilities
Installation and Configuration:


	Attending to customer premises to install and configure ISP services, including internet connectivity, routers, modems, and other networking equipment.
	Follow installation guidelines, technical specifications, and company procedures to ensure accurate setup and connectivity.
	Test and verify the performance of installed services to ensure they meet the desired speed, reliability, and quality standards.
	Educate customers on the proper use and maintenance of the installed equipment and services.


Troubleshooting and Issue Resolution:


	Diagnose and resolve technical issues related to network connectivity, equipment malfunction, or service disruptions.
	Respond to customer complaints or service requests in a timely manner and provide effective solutions to address their concerns.
	Collaborate with internal teams, such as coordinators, network operations and support, to escalate and resolve complex issues when necessary.
	Maintain detailed documentation of customer interactions, service requests, and problem resolutions.


Customer Service and Communication:


	Interact professionally and courteously with customers, ensuring a positive customer experience during the installation process.
	Communicate technical information to customers in a clear and understandable manner, addressing any questions or concerns they may have.
	Provide recommendations for improving network performance, equipment upgrades, or additional services based on customer requirements and industry best practices.
	Collaborate with sales teams or account managers to gather customer feedback and identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling services.


Quality Assurance and Compliance:


	Ensure installations are completed according to company standards, policies, and regulatory requirements.
	Perform regular audits and quality checks on installed services to identify any deficiencies and implement corrective actions.
	Stay updated with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices related to ISP installations to enhance service delivery and customer satisfaction.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:  [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Secretary",
  "description": "LVTOPSUN New Energy Company Limited&nbsp;(Guangdong LVTOPSUN New Energy Co., Ltd.) isa professional Chinese manufacturer specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of&nbsp;lithium-ion energy storage batteries&nbsp;and systems, particularly for home and commercial use, offering solutions like LiFePO4 batteries, battery packs, and energy storage containers. Established in 2008, they focus on high-quality, safe, long-lasting products for solar energy integration, with business in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location:&nbsp;Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Core Administrative and Executive Support Duties:


	Managing a complex calendar, scheduling meetings, appointments, and proactively resolving conflicts.
	Screening calls, emails, and general requests, responding to or redirecting them as appropriate, and drafting high-level correspondence, memos
	Preparing high-level correspondence, presentations, and reports.
	Cross-Departmental Coordination: Synchronizing activities between sales, engineering, and installation teams to ensure smooth workflow.
	Meeting Management: Organizing and coordinating meetings, preparing agendas and board packs, taking detailed minutes, and following up on action items to ensure timely execution of decisions.
	Information and Records Management: Developing and maintaining efficient filing systems for both physical and digital confidential records and executive documentation.
	Supporting the MD with research, documentation, and tracking the progress of specific projects or strategic initiatives.


Corporate Governance and Compliance Responsibilities:


	Overseeing the timely and accurate submission of statutory returns and notifications to the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) and other sector-specific bodies (e.g., related to renewable energy standards or quality control for inverters/batteries).
	Serving as a formal link between the board, shareholders, internal management, and external regulatory bodies, ensuring transparency and effective communication.
	Preparing, approving (when authorized), signing, and sealing agreements, legal forms, and other official documents.


Sector-Specific Nuances (Solar and Inverter Industry):
The nature of the business means the secretary might also be involved in:


	Understanding and monitoring regulatory changes related to the Nigerian renewable energy sector.
	Managing documentation related to technical projects, site visits, or specific product certifications (solar panels, inverter batteries).
	Collaborating with various departments (e.g., IT, legal, finance, engineering) on administrative processes and project coordination within the energy value chain.


Office &amp; Financial Management:


	Documenting the MD&rsquo;s expenses and assisting with basic bookkeeping tasks like processing invoices.
	Resource Management: Managing office systems and inventory to ensure the executive office operates efficiently.


Qualifications


	B.Sc Degree / HND qualification in Business Administration, Office Management, Secretarial Studies, or a related field.
	Experience: 5 - 8
	Professional certification an added advantage.
	Preferably female, residing around Okota, Amuwo Odofin and Festac axis.


Skills:


	Excellent typing speed and transcription accuracy.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, and digital collaboration tools.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	High level of discretion, attention to detail, and professionalism.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;voxaby2@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidates residing close to Amuwo Odofin and its environs would be given priority.",

Secretary Job at Lvtopsun New Energy Company Limited




        
    

        
        LVTOPSUN New Energy Company Limited (Guangdong LVTOPSUN New Energy Co., Ltd.) isa professional Chinese manufacturer specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of lithium-ion energy storage batteries and systems, particularly for home and commercial use, offering solutions like LiFePO4 batteries, battery packs, and energy storage containers. Established in 2008, they focus on high-quality, safe, long-lasting products for solar energy integration, with business in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Responsibilities
Core Administrative and Executive Support Duties:


	Managing a complex calendar, scheduling meetings, appointments, and proactively resolving conflicts.
	Screening calls, emails, and general requests, responding to or redirecting them as appropriate, and drafting high-level correspondence, memos
	Preparing high-level correspondence, presentations, and reports.
	Cross-Departmental Coordination: Synchronizing activities between sales, engineering, and installation teams to ensure smooth workflow.
	Meeting Management: Organizing and coordinating meetings, preparing agendas and board packs, taking detailed minutes, and following up on action items to ensure timely execution of decisions.
	Information and Records Management: Developing and maintaining efficient filing systems for both physical and digital confidential records and executive documentation.
	Supporting the MD with research, documentation, and tracking the progress of specific projects or strategic initiatives.


Corporate Governance and Compliance Responsibilities:


	Overseeing the timely and accurate submission of statutory returns and notifications to the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) and other sector-specific bodies (e.g., related to renewable energy standards or quality control for inverters/batteries).
	Serving as a formal link between the board, shareholders, internal management, and external regulatory bodies, ensuring transparency and effective communication.
	Preparing, approving (when authorized), signing, and sealing agreements, legal forms, and other official documents.


Sector-Specific Nuances (Solar and Inverter Industry):
The nature of the business means the secretary might also be involved in:


	Understanding and monitoring regulatory changes related to the Nigerian renewable energy sector.
	Managing documentation related to technical projects, site visits, or specific product certifications (solar panels, inverter batteries).
	Collaborating with various departments (e.g., IT, legal, finance, engineering) on administrative processes and project coordination within the energy value chain.


Office & Financial Management:


	Documenting the MD’s expenses and assisting with basic bookkeeping tasks like processing invoices.
	Resource Management: Managing office systems and inventory to ensure the executive office operates efficiently.


Qualifications


	B.Sc Degree / HND qualification in Business Administration, Office Management, Secretarial Studies, or a related field.
	Experience: 5 - 8
	Professional certification an added advantage.
	Preferably female, residing around Okota, Amuwo Odofin and Festac axis.


Skills:


	Excellent typing speed and transcription accuracy.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, and digital collaboration tools.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	High level of discretion, attention to detail, and professionalism.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidates residing close to Amuwo Odofin and its environs would be given priority.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sofware Tester (QA Analyst)
Job Location:&nbsp;Owerri, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Software Testers (QA Analysts) to join our growing technology team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for testing web and mobile applications, identifying bugs, and ensuring high-quality product delivery before release.
	At Uptitek, we build digital solutions that solve real business problems.
	As a tester, you will play a critical role in ensuring our products are reliable, user-friendly, and meet industry standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Test web and mobile applications for functionality, usability, and performance
	Identify, document, and report bugs in a clear and structured manner
	Execute test cases and scenarios based on product requirements
	Collaborate with developers and product teams to resolve issues
	Perform regression testing after fixes are implemented
	Provide feedback to improve user experience and system performance
	Ensure all applications meet quality standards before deployment


Requirements


	Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking
	Good written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to identify issues and clearly describe them
	Basic understanding of websites, apps, and user behavior
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Previous experience in software testing or QA
	Experience testing mobile or web applications.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / month

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;contactus@uptitek.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application for Software Tester (QA Analyst) - Uptitek Limited&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Sofware Tester (QA Analyst) Job at Uptitek Limited




        
    

        
        Uptitek Limited is a leading software company specializing in the development and implementation of Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) and Government Resource Planning (GRP) solutions. With a diverse portfolio of over 50 custom-built applications, we cater to the needs of businesses, governments, and other organizations worldwide.

At Uptitek, we take pride in our role as product owners, driving innovation and efficiency through cutting-edge software solutions. Our team of skilled developers and industry experts collaborate closely with clients to understand their unique requirements and deliver tailored solutions that streamline operations, enhance productivity, and drive growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sofware Tester (QA Analyst)
Job Location: Owerri, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Software Testers (QA Analysts) to join our growing technology team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for testing web and mobile applications, identifying bugs, and ensuring high-quality product delivery before release.
	At Uptitek, we build digital solutions that solve real business problems.
	As a tester, you will play a critical role in ensuring our products are reliable, user-friendly, and meet industry standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Test web and mobile applications for functionality, usability, and performance
	Identify, document, and report bugs in a clear and structured manner
	Execute test cases and scenarios based on product requirements
	Collaborate with developers and product teams to resolve issues
	Perform regression testing after fixes are implemented
	Provide feedback to improve user experience and system performance
	Ensure all applications meet quality standards before deployment


Requirements


	Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking
	Good written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to identify issues and clearly describe them
	Basic understanding of websites, apps, and user behavior
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Previous experience in software testing or QA
	Experience testing mobile or web applications.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / month

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for Software Tester (QA Analyst) - Uptitek Limited" as the subject of the mail.
